info.name: Efí Pay Pix API
info.description:
Brazilian Pix instant-payments API for Efí Pay (formerly Gerencianet). Implements the Banco Central do Brasil Pix specification (cob/cobv/cobr, locations, devolutions, Pix keys/EVP) plus Efí Pay extensions for Cash-Out (pixSend), splits, MED infractions, recurring/automatic Pix, statements, receipts, and webhooks. OAuth2 client_credentials with mandatory mutual TLS (P12/PEM certificate).

Contact Support:
 Name: Efí Pay Developer Support

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
